name: Float equality without tolerance
goal: `pkg/geo.py::near` should treat points within eps as equal but uses exact `==`. Fix with abs diff. Adversarial numeric edge.

gold_fix.new_body:
def near(a, b, eps=1e-6):
    return abs(a - b) <= eps
